items.title: Marine veteran vows to stay in North Carolina's US Senate race after violent Capitol arrest
items.description: Marine veteran and Green Party candidate Brian McGinnis remains defiant after a violent removal from a Senate hearing involving Sen. Tim Sheehy.

items.title: Obama, Biden, Clintons remember Jesse Jackson in Chicago memorial service
items.description: Rev. Jesse Jackson's memorial service draws former Presidents Barack Obama, Joe Biden and Bill Clinton to Chicago's House of Hope arena on Friday.
